Kajabi is an [online course platform](https://www.mightynetworks.com/resources/best-online-course-platforms) that’s been popular for a decade. ## LearnWorlds vs Kajabi

### Course Platforms

#### LearnWorlds

![LearnWorlds - Course Manager](https://images.ctfassets.net/m9n8o4ceoyuw/1ZxvBhkXlsPPpMCVlrIaPQ/9bea3a4279aa15e3bb440853cc3ebf51/LearnWorlds_-_Course_Manager.png)

[LearnWorlds](https://www.mightynetworks.com/resources/learnworlds-alternatives) has only become popular in the last few years, but it’s a well-designed asynchronous course platform and it’s growing in popularity. The platform has flexibility to deliver courses with features like:

- Customized learning paths and course player, content dripping, and SCORM-compliance

- AI features like auto transcripts, sticking lessons to a TOC, and adding interactive moments in course videos

- Build 16 types of assignments, customize summary screens, create a bank of questions you can reuse for other assessments, and award branded certificates

- Create surveys to understand students’ experiences


#### Kajabi

![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg height='896' width='1440' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' version='1.1'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

![](<Base64-Image-Removed>)![Kajabi homepage](https://images.ctfassets.net/m9n8o4ceoyuw/3ru5DK3Fw9iQdY6AP5XQeg/22ab37b548790984b7a730bf9d66a08b/kajabi.png?w=1440&h=896&q=50&fm=png)

Like LearnWorlds, [Kajabi](https://www.mightynetworks.com/resources/kajabi-alternatives) has a strong asynchronous course platform. Like LearnWorlds, you can build out a course with most kinds of material: audio, text, video, downloads, quizzes, and surveys. The asynchronous [course builder](https://www.mightynetworks.com/resources/online-course-builder) happens around the LMS function, which has useful features like previews and content dripping.

Kajabi has also adopted AI, like LearnWorlds. But it’s taken a different slant, focusing more on AI text generation for course material and landing pages. The AI tools are public facing, you don’t have to be a Kajabi customer to use them. They include: a course outline generator, lesson content, video scripts, and, finally, landing page, social media, and email copy.

![Kajabi AI tools](https://images.ctfassets.net/m9n8o4ceoyuw/5Hnuel6HrO1EkYoGLCe0f/4ec8593a96f6f7a1ca8afd515226c51b/Kajabi_AI_tools.png)

Kajabi’s course builder is customizable, meaning you can lay out your asynchronous course in the way you choose.

#### Which is better?

Both Kajabi and LearnWorlds are strong in this area. Each offers a comprehensive LMS which is best for asynchronous courses.

- In our opinion, LearnWorlds offers a slightly better course platform. Its features are accessible yet powerful, and has more options for assessments and evaluations.

- Kajabi isn’t as strong as an LMS, but it does have better [course marketing features](https://www.mightynetworks.com/resources/how-to-market-your-online-course). Since they integrate to its course platform, it still may be the better choice for some users (more on this below).


### Live Learning and Communities

#### LearnWorlds

LearnWorlds was obviously designed with the option for live [student engagement](https://www.mightynetworks.com/resources/engage-motivate-students-in-online-courses) in mind. However, it does accomplish most of its live functionality through integrations–which you likely need to pay separately for. But if you can get past this, the live teaching options are pretty good. You can:

- Run live meetings with [Zoom](https://www.mightynetworks.com/resources/zoom-alternatives), Webex, and Calendly integrations–these allow 1:1 or group video sessions.

- Host live sessions with segmented chats, breakout rooms, polls, or share screens

- Record live sessions and download this

- Run different sessions at the same time with different instructors


Although LearnWorlds doesn’t have native [livestreaming](https://www.mightynetworks.com/encyclopedia/live-streaming), the integrations do give you a lot in terms of course delivery for live experiences.

**Communities and memberships**

![LearnWorlds Community 2](https://images.ctfassets.net/m9n8o4ceoyuw/6K4bWs7p6ZIcC8oBCBQW8F/7a9800e541e2bd2ace5fb1188785fd0b/LearnWorlds_Community_2.png)

However, the community side of the live engagement is weak, though. LearnWorlds only offers a basic [community forum](https://www.mightynetworks.com/resources/create-online-community-forum). It can be divided into different spaces, but feels pretty outdated. LearnWorlds has no native community video and has a 20MB attachment limit.

#### Kajabi

Like LearnWorlds, Kajabi accomplishes live learning through a series of integrations and work-arounds. There’s no native livestreaming on Kajabi’s flagship course platform–it requires a third-party streaming platform like [YouTube](https://www.mightynetworks.com/resources/how-much-money-per-view-on-youtube) or StreamYard. However, Kajabi recently acquired a live streaming and chat platform called Vibely, which they have redeployed under the Kajabi brand as “Kajabi 2.0”. This gives Kajabi a livestreaming, teaching, and meeting option, although it happens under a separate platform.

On a desktop, Kajabi 2.0 will open in a separate window, while on a mobile it requires downloading a separate Kajabi app.

**Communities and memberships**

![Kajabi Community 2.0](https://images.ctfassets.net/m9n8o4ceoyuw/3TNUKz80QBLVV675jSjs1j/3cf6dac70455215c26f50abd7d41a334/Kajabi_Community_2.0.png)

As far as [online communities](https://www.mightynetworks.com/resources/online-community), acquiring Vibely also gives Kajabi some improved options here. Traditionally, Kajabi’s community was an extremely simple discussion forum. But with the acquisition of Vibely, Kajabi added:

- [Events](https://www.mightynetworks.com/resources/virtual-event), chat and DMs, and a discussion board feature that can be organized into “circles.” This means more tools for meetings, livestreaming, and more comprehensive discussions than Kajabi could traditionally handle.

- More comprehensive member directories with custom profiles. Members can use it to find other members who share interests.


However, as we said above, the serious UX issue with Kajabi 2.0 is that it requires a separate app. This means 2 downloads and 2 log-ons, vs. an all-in-one [community and course app](https://www.mightynetworks.com/resources/top-online-courses-app). We’ll cover this more below.

#### Which is better?

Overall, Kajabi is better here for live learning and communities. Kajabi 2.0 adds a lot of functionality for live meetings and live instruction that LearnWorlds doesn’t do natively. The separate app is annoying, but you are still in a Kajabi product. You could, for example, integrate WebEx with LearnWorlds, which would create exceptional live experiences. But you would likely have to pay for WebEx too.

**Note: If you are [starting a community](https://www.mightynetworks.com/resources/start-a-community-from-scratch) or [membership business](https://www.mightynetworks.com/resources/how-to-start-a-membership-website-business), neither of these platforms are the right place to start. These are course platforms that have tried to add on community and membership features–neither are built well for this.**

### Business & Marketing

#### LearnWorlds

![LearnWorlds Page Builder](https://images.ctfassets.net/m9n8o4ceoyuw/2itoNd4res2nqfMMxxWdif/8e36eca30793dca3fa8782eff37d3441/LearnDowlrds_Page_Builder.png)

When it comes to branding, LearnWorlds has the tools to deploy a course that looks and feels like yours. This starts with [course design](https://www.mightynetworks.com/resources/effective-online-course-design) pages and website templates (over 400). The site-builder is drag-and-drop and easy-to-use. Or, you can even use custom code to design something from scratch.

While Kajabi is known for business and marketing tools, LearnWorlds has incorporated some useful ones too. This includes:

- A pop-up builder with some pre-set marketing funnels to sell courses

- The option to run promotions, coupons, or your own affiliate program (with dashboard)

- Different ways to sell and gate courses, memberships, subscriptions, or bundles

- Advanced [community analytics](https://www.mightynetworks.com/resources/community-analytics) with automated insights and segmentation by user behavior


#### Kajabi

Kajabi has a site builder too, with a similar drag-and-drop page editor that can be used to customize a course page. But it can also create different elements of a traditional website, plus useful marketing pages (downloads, sales pages, opt-ins, etc.)

![Kajabi integrated marketing](https://images.ctfassets.net/m9n8o4ceoyuw/UReCRmQnEhxdokr5FlPVk/a19aef43a70cc829f7924cec66aafe58/Kajabi_integrated_marketing.png)

The marketing and [sales funnels](https://www.mightynetworks.com/resources/sales-funnel-for-online-courses) are Kajabi’s bread and butter. These features include:

- Pre-made marketing funnels and email tools that all integrate together to help you sell more courses

- Email platform with subscriber management, tags, segmentation, and automated sending

- E-commerce tools like abandoned cart recovery, upsells, and coupons

- Flexible [monetization](https://www.mightynetworks.com/resources/monetization-model) with free trials, subscriptions, or bundles


#### Which is better?

Kajabi’s marketing tools are better here. LearnWorlds has lots of good features, but Kajabi wins out for more powerful marketing tools, more email options, and better integration of everything throughout its course platform. LearnWorlds does have some automated emails, but not the full email platform Kajabi has.

Kajabi has a well-deserved reputation as a marketing powerhouse.

### Price

**Kajabi Price**

- $69/mo - Kickstarter (1 product, 1 funnel + 250 contacts)

- $149/mo - Basic (3 products, 3 funnels + 10,000 contacts)

- $199/mo - Growth (15 products, 15 funnels, + 25,000 contacts)

- $399/mo - Pro (100 products, 100 funnels + 100,000 contacts)


**LearnWorlds Price**

- $29/mo + $5/course sale - Starter (1 admin, 3 website pages)

- $99/mo - Pro Trainer (adds unlimited pages, pop-ups, memberships, and funnels)

- $299/mo - Learning Center (interactive videos, white-labeling, 25 admins)

- $598/mo - Learning Center + App


### Apps and Access

#### LearnWorlds

LearnWorlds is an unusual course platform in that it only offers [branded apps](https://www.mightynetworks.com/encyclopedia/branded-app). (Many platforms offer the opposite–an integrated basic app but no [white-label apps](https://www.mightynetworks.com/encyclopedia/white-label-mobile-apps).) The app platform is a DIY, drag-and-drop app builder that you submit to LearnWorlds for deployment.

![LearnWorlds App Builder](https://images.ctfassets.net/m9n8o4ceoyuw/7EdF0ASGugxyRA1vu4JKMq/5b72fd1e61a2d888b24fa9674c767221/LearnWorlds_App_Builder.png)

This is okay if you want a branded course app. However, is it a significant upsell from LearnWorlds’ main offerings, so it’s a letdown for course instructors looking for a course-app that’s included. And, the apps are also poorly rated–and one of the most frequent complaints about LearnWorlds on G2. LearnWorld’s track record here is seriously not great–so if you’re considering having app access as a major component of your course offering, make sure LearnWorlds can do what you need it to.

#### Kajabi

As we’ve been hinting at through the article, Kajabi does have apps. But it does also require several apps to get its main features, which can be annoying. These include:

**Kajabi Course App**: This is the OG of the Kajabi apps that works best for asynchronous courses. It delivers a course table of contents and individual lessons.

![Kajabi main app](https://images.ctfassets.net/m9n8o4ceoyuw/3WLNYKNloD7lwl9zpiTgbp/6b463e591fd435cf0e469269a1470b23/Kajabi_main_app_-_1.png)

**Kajabi Community App**: This is the rebranded Vibely app that works for livestreaming and live meetings, as well as a decent community function built around “circles.”

![Kajabi 2.0 - app screens](https://images.ctfassets.net/m9n8o4ceoyuw/6PGVvr4B2X9dorfgbp5hgi/db5895050462fe56777e636bfe83bbf9/Kajabi_2.0_-_app_screens.png)

Kajabi also has a new, branded app option which lines up with LearnWorld’s branded app. We don’t have a ton of info about this feature yet, but it seems similar in theory–you build a course and then Kajabi charges you extra to deploy it in the App Store and Google Play Store. This is the only way to get a Kajabi [course and community on the same app](https://www.mightynetworks.com/resources/bring-your-community-to-a-mighty-network) (which many other platforms do without needing to pay for a premium plan).

### Which is better?

It depends.

- Kajabi’s apps are included with its plans. But it’s annoying that you need 2 different apps to do courses and communities. If you only wanted to run an asynchronous course, the original Kajabi app would work perfectly fine.

- LearnWorlds only has a branded app. This means paying more to get any mobile access for your learners. And the reviews are really bad.


The short answer is, neither Kajabi or LearnWorlds really does that well with apps. For both platforms, the apps have a weird relationship to their main course offerings, and aren’t integrated in a way that makes sense when compared to other course platforms–in which apps are just native, and have the same features of the webapp.

## The Verdict

In comparing LearnWorlds vs Kajabi, the verdict will depend on your preferred features.

- If you want high-functioning marketing tools with an app included, Kajabi might be a better choice.

- If you want a more comprehensive course platform and don’t mind paying for a branded app (to get any app access), then LearnWorlds might be a better option.


However, **neither platform was designed for live engagement with students**. **Neither has native livestreaming** and live teaching that lives in the same space as a course.

Both seem to be playing catch-up for synchronous course experiences, and neither would be the right platform to run a course and community together.

web.markdown:
[![LW Evolution 4x banner image](https://www.learnworlds.com/app/themes/learnworlds/assets/images/lw-evolution-4x/banner-img-v3.webp)\\

Artificial Intelligence has been the talk of the town for a while now, with ChatGPT being one of the most significant AI-related advancements this year.

ChatGPT has been trained with machine learning algorithms and deep learning techniques and demonstrates extraordinary natural language processing capabilities. The result? This unique technology has reshaped [content creation](https://www.learnworlds.com/blog/coursedesign/chatgpt-create-online-courses/), making it faster and more effortless than ever.

Naturally, the eLearning industry couldn’t be left unaffected – we see all the more Learning Management Systems incorporating [AI technology](https://www.learnworlds.com/product/updates/learnworlds-ai-assistant/) to offer automations, facilitate content creation, and help educators and trainers build personalized learning paths.

In this post, **we compare 5 top AI-driven platforms and their AI capabilities regarding content creation**: [LearnWorlds](https://www.learnworlds.com/compare/ai-lms-comparison/#learnworlds), [Kajabi](https://www.learnworlds.com/compare/ai-lms-comparison/#kajabi), [Thinkific](https://www.learnworlds.com/compare/ai-lms-comparison/#thinkific), [Teachable](https://www.learnworlds.com/compare/ai-lms-comparison/#teachable), and [EdApp](https://www.learnworlds.com/compare/ai-lms-comparison/#edapp).

While all five platforms use AI to speed up content creation, they do not use it for the same purpose. Some apply AI primarily to marketing and promotion, while others use it to support instructional design and learning effectiveness. This distinction is essential when evaluating AI-powered learning management systems.

## LearnWorlds

![a screenshot of the LearnWorlds landing page showing a course outline created with AI](https://www.learnworlds.com/app/uploads/2023/11/LearnWorlds-landing-page.png)

The [LearnWorlds AI assistant](https://www.learnworlds.com/blog/ai/) is integrated into our platform to help you create your course fast and efficiently every step of the way. From generating a detailed course outline to offering personalized learner feedback, our top-notch AI tools have your back.

But what matters more than speed is quality – and here’s where our AI-powered LMS platform outshines the competition.

LearnWorlds uses AI as an instructional design assistant, helping course creators make informed decisions about structure, learning activities, assessments, and feedback, not just generate content faster.

Powered by the latest open AI models, the [LearnWorlds AI assistant](https://www.learnworlds.com/product/updates/learnworlds-ai-assistant/), has been designed by our eLearning experts and features over **200 prebuilt prompts** – something that no other platform offers. The prompts are customizable and cover diverse use cases, ensuring you won’t leave any important details out.

The quality is evident not only in the way the LearnWorlds AI assistant is built but also in the options available.

💁 For example, with LearnWorlds, you won’t built a random course – you can choose your preferred learning model and activities to create a course built on proven methodologies and according to your preferences and learners’ needs.

**LearnWorlds AI assistant doesn’t simply follow – it leads**, guiding you toward eLearning best practices and teaching methods you may have been unaware of. More than learning content, our user-friendly AI tool has been designed to offer **real-time assistance** and guidance and to **build memorable**, **personalized** **learning experiences**.

### AI functionality

#### Course Planner

Course creation can be quite time-consuming. And isn’t it frustrating that much of this time is dedicated to planning the course before actually [creating any content](https://www.learnworlds.com/blog/coursedesign/unlock-creativity-with-chatgpt/)? Well, not anymore!

The LearnWorlds AI assistant is available for you inside the platform’s Course Builder to help you craft in-depth course outlines tailored to your needs and preferences.

You need to insert at least the main topic and type of learning activities you want to include. For a 100% custom-tailored outline, you can additionally define the following:

- Course level
- Key topics
- Instructional approach
- Number of sections & learning activities per section
- Resources to include or pull out information from
- Course audience
- Tone of voice

![](https://s3.amazonaws.com/cdn.freshdesk.com/data/helpdesk/attachments/production/12129145632/original/4JnAlQMpk-BgM3J1Afe_xj4v3EyGJUBeYg.gif?1690814074)

Of course, you have complete control over the output, as you can alter the built-in prompts, modify certain parts of the output (add/reduce activities, reorder sections and modules, and more), or ask the AI assistant to regenerate the outline from scratch.

You can use this feature even with existing courses. **Let AI suggest new sections** and **activities** to enrich your course and add value to your learners.

👉 _Learn more about how to use the LearnWorlds AI Assistant to create a course outline in this [article](https://support.learnworlds.com/support/solutions/articles/12000095121-how-to-utilize-ai-artificial-intelligence-to-create-a-course-outline)._

#### Ebook Writer

Another lengthy part of content creation is [writing an eBook](https://www.learnworlds.com/docs/how-to-create-an-ebook/). And it’s even more time-consuming when writing is not your strongest skill. The thing is, eBooks are fantastic magnet leads and the preferred learning method for your visual learners.

Before you give up on eBooks and miss the opportunity to attract leads and engage your learners, try our AI assistant.

There’s a lot the LearnWorlds AI Assistant can help you with:

- Generate content based on the resources you supply it with
- Write from scratch or improve your tone and writing style (e.g., based on the audience you’ve selected)
- Proofread the content for grammar, syntax, typos, and structure
- Generate learning objectives
- Simplify a topic and extract key definitions
- Explain a topic as a fictional or real character

![](https://s3.amazonaws.com/cdn.freshdesk.com/data/helpdesk/attachments/production/12129123652/original/ySqgdnVeHkM_Gse1iK5OgQHTkGI-07re_A.png?1690787972)

And that’s not all – not by a long shot! LearnWorlds AI assistant can additionally generate the following:

- Stories
- Q&As
- Timelines
- Journal prompts
- Glossaries
- Socratic dialogue
- Different viewpoints
- Concept comparisons, misconceptions & critiques
- Pros & cons
- Dilemmas
- Discussion prompts
- Instructional text
- Fun content like jokes or emoji stories

![](https://s3.amazonaws.com/cdn.freshdesk.com/data/helpdesk/attachments/production/12129137382/original/wlKo_kKdlMHwq2QKIQ10bOQE3Ni7dY6BWg.png?1690806555)

Imagine adding content like that to your eBook! Even the most reluctant readers will reconsider how fun books can be – not to mention that the educational value of your eBook will skyrocket. Adding a funny story or explaining a concept as a popular character will definitely keep your learners hooked and, as a result, improve [knowledge retention](https://www.learnworlds.com/blog/elearning/knowledge-retention/).

👉 _Learn more about how to author ebooks using the LearnWorlds AI Assistant in this [article](https://support.learnworlds.com/support/solutions/articles/12000095122-how-to-author-ebooks-using-ai-artificial-intelligence-)._

#### Content Editor

Need a second pair of eyes to check your learning materials, landing page copy, or emails? Because developing a learning program and building all that content means there are bound to be a few typos here and there.

LearnWorlds Content Editor is available inside the Ebook Builder, Email Editor, and Site Builder and can make massive improvements to your text.

- Shorten, expand, or summarize
- Improve grammar and syntax
- Rephrase
- Make the text more powerful, catchy, or compelling
- Analyze the style, tone, and voice
- Change the tone
- Translate

💁 **Tip**: Use the AI assistant’s content editing capabilities while you’re in the Site Builder to improve your landing page copy. The AI assistant offers you so many options to rework the original content that even the most dull text can be transformed into a compelling landing page!

👉 _Learn more about LearnWorlds’ content editing capabilities using AI [here](https://support.learnworlds.com/support/solutions/articles/12000095122-how-to-author-ebooks-using-ai-artificial-intelligence-#edit-text-0-4)._

#### Assessment Designer

[Assessments](https://www.learnworlds.com/product/features/assessment-builder-feature/) are an integral part of the learning journey, from start to finish. They help you measure learner progress and verify whether your students have achieved the learning outcomes before awarding them a certification.

The LearnWorlds AI assistant can generate assessment questions or edit the ones you’ve created on your own, both for your graded and non-graded assessments. You can select:

- Type of quiz you want (multiple choice, ordering, open-ended, and more)
- Type of question, based on Bloom’s Taxonomy
- Difficulty level
- Tone of voice
- Define the context
- Key terms to be assessed

![](https://s3.amazonaws.com/cdn.freshdesk.com/data/helpdesk/attachments/production/12129136366/original/ZXtUbWBoDugeke7saJidWDt9cQ5iLl7t3w.gif?1690805063)

With the content editor functionality, you can proofread and improve your text afterward.

👉 _Learn more about how to create assessments using the LearnWorlds AI Assistant in this [article](https://support.learnworlds.com/support/solutions/articles/12000095126-how-to-create-assessments-using-ai-artificial-intelligence-)._

#### Personalized Feedback Generator

Personalized learning should include constructive, personalized feedback. Whether in employee training or generic online courses, **feedback is an integral part of the learning process**, as it invites learners to reflect and draw valuable insights about their approach to studying.

In the LearnWorlds platform, all the assessments pending review are in the Review Center. **Just go to the one you want to review, locate the AI assistant widget, and allow it to generate feedback!** You can do so for both graded and non-graded assessments.

![](https://s3.amazonaws.com/cdn.freshdesk.com/data/helpdesk/attachments/production/12129121783/original/ilAG8A3BFRVnELWQeIOWcc44Q7n14solTg.png?1690785174)

You have several options here for personalized feedback:

- Feedback type (strengths & weaknesses analysis, positive reinforcement, and more)
- Key points to include
- Length
- Strictness level
- Tone of voice

![](https://s3.amazonaws.com/cdn.freshdesk.com/data/helpdesk/attachments/production/12129037816/original/lLrnWw_XB4ZJiUj6jX8m0wy6DymEt9KAuw.gif?1690529127)

Once again, you can polish the text with the help of AI, and you can choose between delivering the feedback automatically or manually.

👉 _Learn more about how to provide feedback for assessments using the LearnWorlds AI Assistant in this [article](https://support.learnworlds.com/support/solutions/articles/12000095083-how-to-provide-feedback-to-assessments-using-ai-review-center-)._

#### Email Creator

Learner engagement is cultivated beyond the immediate learning environment. So, last but not least, let’s see how you can craft email notifications powered by AI to build and maintain a good rapport with your audience.

In LearnWorlds, you can send automated notification emails to your users when certain key events occur, e.g., upon course enrollment, registration, subscription renewal, etc. All these types of emails feature templates that you can build on.

Alternatively, you can use the LearnWorlds AI assistant to:

- Write notification emails from scratch
- Edit/rewrite existing email templates
- Translate

![](https://s3.amazonaws.com/cdn.freshdesk.com/data/helpdesk/attachments/production/12131580293/original/ulA6cTph6ZVIZqFxq7Y9KgUcon-yLl8R_A.png?1695205347)

👉 _Learn more about how to craft school email notifications using the LearnWorlds AI Assistant in this [article](https://support.learnworlds.com/support/solutions/articles/12000095982-how-to-craft-school-email-notifications-using-ai-artificial-intelligence-)._

#### AI-enhanced videos

Video is at the core of modern online learning, but producing, updating, and optimizing video content can be time-consuming. LearnWorlds enhances video-based learning with AI-powered features that help creators deliver more accessible, engaging, and effective video experiences.

With AI-enhanced videos, you can:

- Automatically generate subtitles for your videos

- Translate subtitles into multiple languages to support global audiences

- Improve accessibility and learner comprehension

- Make video content easier to search, follow, and revisit


These AI enhancements ensure that video lessons are not just visually engaging, but also inclusive and optimized for different learning needs and contexts.

By combining interactive video tools with AI-powered enhancements, LearnWorlds enables creators to turn video content into a stronger learning asset—without extra production effort.

👉 Learn more about AI-powered tools in LearnWorlds in the [Quick Start Guide](https://support.learnworlds.com/support/solutions/articles/12000105890-quick-start-guide-9-ai-powered-tools-in-learnworlds).

### AI insights (reporting & learner analytics)

Creating content is only half of the equation. Understanding how learners interact with that content is what allows course creators, trainers, and schools to continuously improve learning outcomes. LearnWorlds AI Insights helps you turn raw data into clear, actionable insights, without needing advanced analytics skills.

Inside your school’s reporting area, AI Insights allows you to:

- Instantly summarize learner activity and engagement

- Identify patterns in course progress, drop-offs, and completions

- Understand how learners perform across courses, learning activities, and assessments

- Get plain-language explanations of complex reports and metrics


Instead of manually digging through dashboards, you can ask AI-powered questions and receive concise explanations that highlight what matters most. This makes reporting more accessible to non-technical users and helps school owners make faster, data-informed decisions.

AI Insights is especially valuable for:

- Improving course structure and pacing
- Spotting underperforming content or activities
- Optimizing certifications and assessments

- Reporting results to stakeholders or clients without manual analysis

👉 Learn more about how to use AI to enhance reporting with AI Insights in this [article](https://support.learnworlds.com/support/solutions/articles/12000102676-how-to-use-ai-to-enhance-reporting-in-your-learnworlds-school-ai-insights-).

While Kajabi’s AI features are useful for generating marketing and promotional content, they offer limited support for instructional design decisions. The AI tools focus on drafting and repurposing content rather than guiding course creators on learning objectives, instructional approaches, assessment strategy, or learner feedback.

### AI availability

Available in all plans and the 30-day free trial with the following prompt limits per month:

- Trial – 100
- Starter – 300
- Pro – 500
- Learning Center – 1000
- High Volume – 2000

### LearnWorlds pricing plans

- Starter $29/mo
- Pro Trainer $99/mo
- Learning Center $299/mo
- High Volume & Corporate: custom

## Kajabi

![An image showing Kajabi's interface.](https://www.learnworlds.com/app/uploads/2023/11/kajabi-platform.jpg)

Kajabi offers a set of AI-powered features designed to support course creators with content creation and marketing tasks. Rather than a standalone AI creator hub, Kajabi’s AI capabilities are embedded within the platform and are available to paying customers, depending on plan and feature rollout.

### AI functionality

#### Course outline and lesson content generation

Kajabi’s AI tools can assist with generating high-level course outlines and lesson content based on a provided topic. These outputs focus on structure and draft content, with limited options for instructional customization.

#### Landing page copy generation

Kajabi Assist can help generate draft copy for sales pages, including suggested sections and calls to action, to speed up page creation.

#### Sales and marketing content generation

The AI can generate:

- Sales email drafts
- Promotional video script drafts
- Social media post copy

These tools are designed primarily for marketing and promotional use rather than instructional design.

#### Conversational AI assistant (Ama)

Ama is Kajabi’s conversational AI assistant, available inside the platform. It can generate various types of content such as blog posts, sales emails, landing page copy, and basic website code, based on user prompts.

#### Creator Studio (AI-powered content repurposing)

Creator Studio uses AI to repurpose existing video content into written and short-form assets, such as emails, blog posts, landing page copy, or video clips. This feature focuses on content reuse rather than original course authoring.

#### Mobile app content assistant

Kajabi also offers AI-assisted content creation inside its mobile Creator App, allowing users to generate short-form marketing content such as emails or social media posts.

#### AI availability

Kajabi’s AI features are not available as free, standalone tools. Access is provided within the Kajabi platform and is limited to paying plans, with some features released gradually or available in beta.

### Kajabi pricing plans

Offers a free trial with a credit card. Then it goes to a monthly payment of the subscription plan, which includes:

- Kickstarter plan: $89/month
- Basic plan: $179/month
- Growth plan: $249/month
- Pro plan: $499/month
- Enterprise: contact sales

_\*Additional transaction fees may apply on newer plans, especially when using third-party payment providers instead of Kajabi Payments_

_\*Pricing information retrieved from Kajabi in December 2025._

## Thinkific

![a screenshot of Thinkific's landing page showing a young woman holding a camera and smiling](https://www.learnworlds.com/app/uploads/2023/11/Thinkific-landing-page.png)

Thinkific offers a growing set of AI-powered features designed to support course creation, marketing, and learner engagement. Unlike its earlier AI offering, which focused mainly on public, free idea generators, Thinkific now provides several in-platform AI tools available to users on paid plans or during the free trial.

### AI functionality

#### AI course outline generator

Thinkific’s AI Course Outline Generator helps creators build a high-level course structure. By providing information about the audience, learning goals, and knowledge level, the tool generates an outline with chapters and text lesson placeholders. While useful for initial structuring, the AI does not generate full lesson content.

#### AI quiz generator

The AI Quiz Generator can create quiz questions based on existing course content within a chapter, including text, PDFs, or videos with captions. This allows creators to generate assessment questions more quickly, though quiz formats remain limited.

#### AI landing pages

Thinkific offers AI-assisted landing page creation, generating draft copy for sales pages to help creators promote courses more efficiently.

#### AI-assisted email automation

Creators can use AI to generate email copy for automated email sequences, supporting basic learner communication and marketing workflows.

#### AI-powered closed captions

Thinkific includes AI-generated closed captions for video content, available on higher-tier plans. This feature supports accessibility and basic content localization.

#### Public AI creator tools

In addition to in-platform features, Thinkific offers a set of free AI tools on its website, including:

- Business name generator

- Course name generator

- Community name generator

- Course idea generator

- Social media post generator

- Group topic generator


These tools are primarily designed for brainstorming and marketing ideation rather than instructional design.

### AI availability

Thinkific’s public AI creator tools are available for free on its website. In-platform AI features — including course outlines, quizzes, landing pages, email automation, and captions, require a paid plan, though all AI tools can be tested during Thinkific’s free trial. Thinkific no longer offers a permanently free plan.

### Thinkific pricing plans

Thinkfic is free to join, but its free plan comes with limited functionality. It offers a 30-day free trial on the Pro plan.

Its subscription plans include:

- Basic – $49/month
- Start – $99/month
- Grow – $199/month
- Thinkific Plus – Customized pricing

\*Pricing information retrieved from Thinkific in December 2025.

## Teachable

![a screenshot of Teachable's landing page showing a young man working on laptop in a casual setting](https://www.learnworlds.com/app/uploads/2023/11/Teachable-landing-page.png)

[Teachable’s AI hub](https://teachable.com/ai-hub) is a set of AI tools integrated into the platform that help you move past creative blocks and the tedious parts of course creation. Let’s see Teachable’s AI tools one by one.

### AI functionality

#### Curriculum Generator

The Curriculum Generator works pretty straightforwardly: name your course, add a brief description of what it’s about, and voila! You’ll get a course outline with sections and lessons. If you don’t like the output, you can ask for a rework.

#### Quiz Generator

The quiz generator helps you design multiple-choice quizzes, which is the only type of quiz that Teachable offers anyway. Go to the section where you want to add the quiz (it must contain text content), and ask the Quiz Generator to create a quiz. You can modify or enrich the quiz generated as you see fit.

#### Summary Generator

The Summary Generator will create summaries out of text content for you. This feature is not available for entire courses but for course sections. The AI will process the text and create a summary for you that you can add to any part of the course you like.

#### Subtitle & Translation Generator

The Subtitle Generator can generate subtitles in 8 languages, which it can later translate into 72 languages. The tool is available in the video editor, so you can quickly process the videos you want directly within your course.

#### Lesson Writing Assistant

This AI assist tool can generate text for your lessons to speed up the content development process. Provide it with a brief description of the lesson topic and choose the desired length type and style (you can choose between casual, neutral, or formal), and it will generate text.

### AI availability

AI tools are available across all plans, including the free plan. The only exception is the Subtitle Generator, which is available on paid plans only.

### Teachable pricing plans

- Free
- Basic $59/mo
- Pro $159/m
- Pro+ $249/mo
- Business $499/mo ($5,998 billed annually)

## EdApp

![a screenshot of EdApp's landing page showing the platform's AI tool](https://www.learnworlds.com/app/uploads/2023/11/EdApp-landing-page.png)

EdApp is a mobile LMS that offers an AI-powered course builder. It recently launched [AI Create](https://www.edapp.com/ai-create/), a set of three AI-powered tools to help course creators save time from the brainstorming and research part of course creation.Let’s have a look at the AI functionality.

### AI functionality

#### Course Creator

This tool can generate a one-lesson course for you. Insert the course topic and a few keywords or a summary, and “AI Create” will return with not only text but also slides and images (pulled out from Bing) as well. If you want to launch one or more mini-courses as lead magnets, this tool is a good time saver.

#### Lesson Creator

With the Lesson Creator, you can create lessons within an existing course as long as you provide the tool with some key points it can process and expand on. Similarly to the course creator, the Lesson generator will generate a lesson with text, slides, and images.

#### Questions Creator

The Questions Generator can create multiple-choice, circle-the-answer, chat, and carousel questions for your lesson. Enter your topic, some keywords, or a small paragraph, and you’ll have your quiz ready in a few seconds.

#### AI Translation

EdApp’s AI translation tool can translate all your course content at once into more than 100 languages with 60-70% accuracy. After the AI translator has translated your course, link the translated version to the original course to enable learners to access the course in the language their devices are set.

### AI availability

AI Create is available on the free plan, while AI translation is available on the Pro Plan and above.

### EdApp pricing plans

- Free
- DIY – US $2.95 per active user/ mo
- Managed – US $2.95- $5.95 per active user/ mo
- Enterprise – custom

When comparing LearnWorlds and Kajabi from an instructional design perspective, the difference is clear. LearnWorlds treats AI as a pedagogical assistant, designed to help educators make better instructional decisions and create effective learning experiences. Kajabi, on the other hand, applies AI primarily as a marketing and content acceleration tool, supporting promotion rather than learning design.

As you can see, LearnWorlds stands as the leading AI-based Learning Management System, equipped with an unparalleled AI assistant that proactively guides you.

Here are some exclusive features you won’t find in any other platform but LearnWorlds:

- AI insights
- Interactive iVideos
- Feedback generator

- Over 200 pre-built prompts

What’s remarkable about the **LearnWorlds AI Assistant** is that it **helps you grow as an online educator**.

For example, you may not know much about instructional approaches or types of feedback. Or maybe Bloom’s taxonomy sounds like a boarding game to you. By listing the most commonly used options in the pre-built prompts, the AI assistant invites you to explore new eLearning concepts further and hone your skills.

This learning-first approach is what ultimately sets LearnWorlds apart in a landscape where AI is often used to sell content rather than improve how people learn.  Try LearnWorlds today with a [30-day free trial](https://www.learnworlds.com/getstarted/) and work your magic with the help of the most advanced AI assistant.

web.markdown:
Yesterday, I built the same three-module mini-course twice: first inside LearnWorlds, then again in Kajabi. LearnWorlds felt fresh and relaxed: its AI-powered video editor allowed me to drop quizzes and clickable chapters straight onto the timeline without leaving the page, and it suggested improvements extremely quickly. Kajabi, on the other hand, ran more like a commerce hub and a solid platform. The moment I clicked “publish,” a brand‑new payments dashboard lit up with pre-wired email sequences. If you’re a course creator wondering which option is better for you, we’ve got you covered. Instead of rattling off every feature checkbox, we’ll zoom in on what each platform lets creators be: a learning‑experience architect with granular control (LearnWorlds) or a full‑stack digital merchant with marketing stitched in (Kajabi). Pick the hat you want to wear; the rest of this comparison will help you justify it with numbers and workflow tests. #### _And why should you trust us?_ _We're the creators of_ [_FreshLearn_](https://freshlearn.com/) _, the modern platform that thousands of creators rely on to launch and scale their courses. We've gone beyond building a tool and immersed ourselves in the creator journey over the years. So we know the challenges, frustrations, and scaling needs of creators just like you. This is that hard-won, inside-scoop perspective._ ## Quick Verdict: Who Should Use LearnWorlds vs Kajabi? | | | | --- | --- | | LearnWorlds is for you if | Kajabi is for you if | | ✅ You want to add quizzes, clickable hotspots, and AI‑generated subtitles inside your videos for deep learner engagement.
✅ You need SCORM/xAPI support, robust assessment tools, and even a branded mobile app, yet still prefer plans that start under $25 per month.
✅ You’re happy to plug in Mailchimp, ActiveCampaign, or other email tools rather than rely on a built‑in marketing engine. | ✅ You’re building a multi‑product brand and want website, community, email, payments, and analytics in one tool.
✅ You like having pre‑made funnels and visual automations so you can launch offers fast with minimal tinkering.
✅ You’re comfortable paying $149 to $399 per month for an all‑in‑one platform that handles scale and convenience. | ## At-a-Glance Comparison: Learnworlds vs Kajabi vs FreshLearn | | | | | | --- | --- | --- | --- | | Criteria | LearnWorlds | Kajabi | FreshLearn | | User rating | [4.6/5](https://www.trustpilot.com/review/www.learnworlds.com) | [4.0/5](https://uk.trustpilot.com/review/kajabi.com?page=2) | [4.7/5](https://www.trustpilot.com/review/freshlearn.com) | | Platform model | Interactive LMS | All‑in‑one creator hub | Modern LMS with native marketing stack | | Best for | Engagement‑driven academies | Creators looking for everything bundled together | Creators wanting advanced course and marketing features without enterprise pricing | | Pricing model | $29 to  $299/mo | $89 to $399/mo | Free plan; paid tiers from $49 (Pro) to $149 (No Brainer +) | | Course creation | Interactive video, quizzes, SCORM | Builder, assessments, drip, community | Full‑featured builder with quizzes, drip, gamification and completion tracking | | Sales funnels and email | 1‑click checkout, basic funnels via widgets | Pre‑made pipelines, advanced automations | Native funnels, landing pages, behaviour‑based automations | | Affiliate marketing | Built‑in affiliate centre | Growth and Pro only; manual payouts | Built‑in affiliate console on all paid plans | Wondering why we’ve inserted Freshlearn in a LearnWorlds vs Kajabi comparison? Because without lifetime lock‑ins or four‑figure monthly bills, FreshLearn gives you a [no‑code LMS](https://freshlearn.com/blog/lms-for-nonprofits/?utm_source=blog), email engine, funnel builder, and affiliate suite under one subscription, starting at the price of Kajabi’s entry tier but without contact caps or transaction fees. That combo makes it a better pick when budgets matter. ## The Main Difference between Learnworlds and Kajabi: Engaging Learner Experiences vs an All-in-One Online Commerce Platform Here's the juicy bit most reviews gloss over when comparing these platforms: Yes, they're both great for creating courses, but they're designed with entirely different creators in mind. And that's important, because knowing what makes each special can save you both time and unnecessary spending. Learnworlds turns your online courses into genuinely engaging experiences. It’s designed for the creator who geeks out over interactive content, such as clickable videos, engaging quizzes, and multimedia-rich eBooks. If your main focus is keeping your students glued to your content (in a good way), Learnworlds brings the magic. But be warned: if you're looking to crank up marketing campaigns or sales funnels, you'll (probably) have to match with other software. Kajabi takes a different approach and packs every online commerce tool imaginable into one box. This platform is built for the "give me one login and call it a day" creators. Courses, emails, websites, and communities; Kajabi covers it all. However, simplicity doesn't come cheap, and if you're not maximizing every feature, your wallet might start feeling the pinch. Let’s explore each platform a bit more closely. ## Brief Overview of LearnWorlds ![Overview of LearnWorlds](https://lh7-rt.googleusercontent.com/docsz/AD_4nXezQgwyFPsJndqzBZM1GabqcSaDT9SmzXQQNDH0i-GiBQepK9friPNeKbVA8SLa-mWJIIDhp4WhZJLiaM3Rd23-ITAT1_h0V4zaQCzZvqXNlFtUQf_IZJ98k_lifUY-gSZisvVaXg?key=QmUdFGrYlC3pnsba8Kfv4g) _Via [LearnWorlds](https://www.learnworlds.com/)_ LearnWorlds is an [online course platform](https://freshlearn.com/?utm_source=blog) built for educators who care about learner engagement. It lets you create dynamic lessons packed with interactive video, quizzes, and digital workbooks that keep learners engaged throughout their journey. LearnWorlds brings social learning to the forefront. You get built-in community spaces and discussion tools that can turn passive viewers into active participants in your lessons. You can easily brand your entire academy, host live sessions, and track learner progress through powerful analytics. If your question is: "How do I create courses students actually love completing?", LearnWorlds has you covered. You’ll still need your own marketing and email tools, but for delivering standout interactive experiences, LearnWorlds is one of the best. ## Brief Overview of Kajabi ![Overview of Kajabi](https://lh7-rt.googleusercontent.com/docsz/AD_4nXdIhDPA5QyXHxQmUVsAE93sbZlxQRktPnr4CDAphrHZosYX-HjoZpgfyGfVSbmN2-v6ogGnfVRhSZPwFpSum3fr3u6_qNiHGNvHw4GVQXqZ_vDpH7k1BfcBC_vH0Dxy8ddHJAGcvw?key=QmUdFGrYlC3pnsba8Kfv4g) _Via [Kajabi](https://kajabi.com/)_ Kajabi is an all-in-one platform designed for entrepreneurs who prefer simplicity over the hassle of multiple tools. It brings course creation, memberships, coaching, and marketing under a single platform to simplify your path from idea to income. It includes built-in email marketing, CRM, automated sales pipelines, and professionally designed templates, so it’s easy to sell and scale quickly. If you want to run and organize your entire knowledge business without sacrificing quality, Kajabi is a great choice. You might still need external communities or niche integrations, but when it comes to running your entire education business from one place, Kajabi is unmatched. ## Feature Face-off: LearnWorlds vs Kajabi Alright, enough niceties. Now we get to the meat of the comparison. Our first face-off is when it comes to course building. Let’s be honest, that’s the main reason you’d pick up either of these two anyway. ### 1\. Course creation and student experience When creators decide between LearnWorlds and Kajabi, there’s often the biggest piece they're overlooking: the experience their students have inside the course. Here, we're talking about just that: the realities of designing your lessons, structuring content, and ensuring your students stay engaged, satisfied, and eager to learn more. #### What’s it like on LearnWorlds? [LearnWorlds](https://freshlearn.com/blog/learnworlds-alternatives/?utm_source=blog) treats course-building like a creative studio. How?First, you click _Create Course_ to launch the step‑by‑step Course Creation Wizard. ![Create course](https://lh7-rt.googleusercontent.com/docsz/AD_4nXei_X5wVoCAtCDUV36VsvZKrbMkuzOavBcR2ZKETfV5L0NZVQZZTLjdvwOYlxHgNTo3giaBfjuXAvgA2uLDPP1mKfjgXLOqzqYEjpgE2dBUpTMK4GV9Ue16XlBXy__d5YBUTtxTqA?key=QmUdFGrYlC3pnsba8Kfv4g) Here, you fill in the title, description, and cover image, and can even use an AI Assistant to auto-generate polished titles and descriptions based on course goals and tone. ![Course Curriculum](https://lh7-rt.googleusercontent.com/docsz/AD_4nXdt4VVPxctkr3MXpVpdtXYwslX44J4BP-eDzpRg-DmFy_jY4PwY3tZe83ec-K3EtX0RQ2wHmhfx_iyTYCfawFwT3m8a4vjUirCuDSJP-_sRHtKOaH0EHgAV1AB-ZWlc_KzDYeW-2w?key=QmUdFGrYlC3pnsba8Kfv4g) You can select from six access types: Draft, Free, Paid, Private, Coming Soon, and Enrollment Closed. These let you plan launches, run teasers, or restrict access precisely. LearnWorlds also follows a modular course structure with rich media options. You can build courses in Sections. Each Section supports diverse Learning Activities: video (with interactive overlays, quizzes, subtitles), SCORM modules, e‑books, PDFs, audio, live sessions (Zoom, Teams, Webex), and even assignment uploads. ![Create a course](https://lh7-rt.googleusercontent.com/docsz/AD_4nXd24G96ErksBQjX2uTllkQmUVymD_QXqHkdu79VX6HyO-6fW8EQt4UuIia1A5QxXk-frW6mPC0xYsujohO8IzMT9o08knE3EvRkdMIk89JEXzYLnHhHc2ITn4neyrpmYYI0Esuo?key=QmUdFGrYlC3pnsba8Kfv4g) Where LearnWorlds really gets its limelight is with interactive video and ebook options. You get to choose from in‑video quizzes, clickable info labels, and in‑player e‑books, all of which are ideal for active, immersive learning. Moreover, you can create custom or templated certificates with merge tags for learner data, or use Credly and Accredible integrations. Gamification features include points, badges, and a leaderboard. ![Course outline](https://lh7-rt.googleusercontent.com/docsz/AD_4nXcbMhEIX0dJ7E0XDlY7bRgaxrEK8JJzchvpa0xbwLRaEk6a4zceFY4HrTxa0DGQQAfoFCdI5CmJgRWGnMszer3WzlldnCB0fryfIcVGBavXJ20o-AYghtLpDsS7_j86LFIAGPGOiQ?key=QmUdFGrYlC3pnsba8Kfv4g) And since LearnWorlds relies quite a lot on AI, you can use AI to generate entire course outlines or bulk‑upload content, then convert it into structured activities. We’ll touch more on branding and marketing later, but know that you get deep branding options through the site builder, theme explorer, widgets, and you can even build a fully branded mobile app with in‑app purchases and push notifications. Now you know what I mean. LearnWorlds offers near-studio-level control, with AI-assisted setup, deep interactivity, multidimensional media, and much more. It’s clearly for creators prioritizing learner engagement. #### What’s it like on Kajabi? If you prioritize efficiency, you’ll like Kajabi more. ![Online courses](https://lh7-rt.googleusercontent.com/docsz/AD_4nXe6fKnsE4GR3dBzdUvjjaFsw0RKKRy0xHk2nx1fVHDXUZ_Qwf1YLEfBhWpOWPds7JCsAQnsJghOTt2Y5CWLqYL5-iuIkavotwnuR4qfKVaToFwGlvjN6D0R93_Yb4qMBXPUc8q4Yw?key=QmUdFGrYlC3pnsba8Kfv4g) To create a course, you’ll first see a quick wizard. Quick, because you just name it, upload a thumbnail, add a description, and optionally generate an outline via AI. ![Create Course title](https://lh7-rt.googleusercontent.com/docsz/AD_4nXdffXIVuhpzropRlzZzKnOIwB4z2u2EeKe4ddmfUu2LcQkPBatYVsRlLt6Rf-bb9izb3Dh5nd9YmFayucXo1Af0W--7nI--1Bbu2V18KtVu3KYvNOFNbEcqw4jOyoS-Bg8IZCa1?key=QmUdFGrYlC3pnsba8Kfv4g) Modules take the place of chapters. You create them with a title, description, and thumbnail, then rearrange them via drag-and-drop. ![Create Curriculum](https://lh7-rt.googleusercontent.com/docsz/AD_4nXfT6gLT2Neqsd8npz1t4kA_YT9dOOnpmtFPlWYkK5G97TytRdU8pMQ4kA5tNib3jt916nnUIZP-iUZJAtiwC23z0MYIJ1XcjxXiHn49sDzguRNnDRY2YZijK2_vGnb9GOSMRw9U?key=QmUdFGrYlC3pnsba8Kfv4g) Within modules, you can add lessons one by one; upload videos, audio, text, files, quizzes, downloadable assets, or embed code, and optionally drip them based on a schedule. ![Templates](https://lh7-rt.googleusercontent.com/docsz/AD_4nXf0NN2WQ4mAq83GVUOsDLN2yoejDembnSD9jEvfDpZjLyvzL98XpWHg4yeBqzN6hr1tiWsYR4nBiA04UYpuhjY65PtTXno04eUDGpHPJCDYrQ4Cvf49KnSTrCHs5Li-IBYWoUFUjg?key=QmUdFGrYlC3pnsba8Kfv4g) Oh, and the templates are a solid 10. You get to choose from a selection of professional templates like Momentum, Creative, and Prosper. They give your courses a branded, polished look, and if something’s not to your liking, you can always customize the layout, colors, fonts, and more in the template editor. ![Drip Settings](https://lh7-rt.googleusercontent.com/docsz/AD_4nXd8hZkDcWs5yoyNz51ooX8YO9DOmpnriqH0TXkOL-pfJYhAQyBuhpgwpxtMR7r_WWxvT2Gvkc3gaHmVxB4iEPzbighufWZC0EMiLVMWzPL82mPH0vFlYdy50scvDz0h2dPVrogSsg?key=QmUdFGrYlC3pnsba8Kfv4g) What else? Oh, there are cohort and drip courses; ideal for challenges or guided programs. You drip content weekly, set a start date for launches, and combine with community or live webinar features. Not to mention that you can add quizzes and certifications in lessons easily, and participant completion is also built in. In summary, Kajabi gives you a smooth, linear, professionally templated workflow. It’s great if you want structure and presentation polish without too much complexity. #### Winner: **LearnWorlds** Both are solid platforms, but we'll give a slight edge to LearnWorlds here. If you’re an author or educator and you need total control over the course creation and teaching process, LearnWorlds will give you better depth and engagement. The immersive learning environments you can build there make it the winner in course creation and student experience. Kajabi wins on speed, polish, and simplicity: ideal for no-fuss courses and cohort-based drip programs. Now, meet Freshlearn, an LMS that gives you the best of both worlds. Here’s how: - **AI-powered course creation** ![Ai Course creation](https://lh7-rt.googleusercontent.com/docsz/AD_4nXfRZlE8rjP7xfnMLfdHkfteikvuINmvB6HdnAmE2DXAJp2p1-LBHumZxbVZGqAyIoaRxC90svSjUCcIAGb-Csm8G2qn22lfC7RsgIug5nUgYaxOI_yMxzCjGIx-HAMi9ZQyrcOwBg?key=QmUdFGrYlC3pnsba8Kfv4g) FreshLearn takes [AI beyond outlines](https://freshlearn.com/features/ai-agents) and helps you instantly generate complete course structures, targeted quizzes, compelling lesson descriptions, and high-converting landing pages. This means faster workflows from idea to launch. - **Flexible and diverse course formats** ![course formats](https://lh7-rt.googleusercontent.com/docsz/AD_4nXcJvPH2f6MbGNQ8R2k9j7xtLFmP00cyvHWrd4wkklVUltfWKo_watjAPvD-3KVR2wEaYo4IAE2JlkDL9fny8TxdhKBrrIz6cKW1MuW4LLqiacihJmh7j2MvysEpltNryBErnfmd-w?key=QmUdFGrYlC3pnsba8Kfv4g) Whether you're running self-paced courses, structured lessons, or hybrid learning paths, FreshLearn easily adapts. It brings you sophisticated drip scheduling, integrated live sessions, comprehensive assignment workflows, customizable certificates, and [gamification tools](https://freshlearn.com/features/gamification) like badges, points, and dynamic leaderboards. - **Built-in student engagement tools** ![student engagement tools](https://lh7-rt.googleusercontent.com/docsz/AD_4nXdPiTh8YD--wJYHvq2RKEsPxpBaq6ty27kiMmyFL-zqZbtLwMcdX-fkAt1U6RKaF4ouq0UVVbbh266tGMKEA5Qbh8GCiNtTzikMVQn0yEUbs1fCmSYKGS3L5Et2OsIKl6lLiY-PQw?key=QmUdFGrYlC3pnsba8Kfv4g) FreshLearn encourages your learners to actively participate with interactive feedback prompts, automated emails triggered by lesson progress, and real-time notifications. This level of interactivity is on par with LearnWorlds, which says something, as LearnWorlds is known for being engaging. - **Zero-fee transactions, mobile app, and open API** ![Mobile App](https://lh7-rt.googleusercontent.com/docsz/AD_4nXelQRMbM9MNSlIh-qx2hkMo5_osyFZoWvBSfsA_vnDTE0IUk06iVSOWg8LM2gZopOtoNUXk9tJaYkAYEznksp5FM-ktUkCGo9xsLJnbxsA_mYQD3FwP63nwKwiCfRYVopRTJN-7lw?key=QmUdFGrYlC3pnsba8Kfv4g) You enjoy easy transactions without platform fees, complete white-label branding control, a dedicated mobile app experience with push notifications, and extensive API integrations for total flexibility. You get the autonomy you need without the extra cost. Freshlearn combines speed, interactivity, flexibility, and cost-efficiency in a single powerful solution. ### 2\. Marketing and revenue generation You’re here to power to course business. So the business part is equally important. Both LearnWorlds and Kajabi are quite packed in this area, but there can be only one winner. Let’s see who wins. #### How does LearnWorlds perform? LearnWorlds includes native checkout pages, supports multiple payment gateways, handles taxes, and allows one-time, subscription, and installment payments. ![Checkout pages](https://lh7-rt.googleusercontent.com/docsz/AD_4nXcQTiE4OfUgYemCvynur6Hw8g3C6yDwQT_HjHG4GBcwyuZ84qVYX5dUTXfl5g5-uCTHs3iEjcwZR0H3sU5kBbQA27fUhGUlMBVRKkNJxDXiMPejza0Qukfm2gfEdUe8MLLwL31r?key=QmUdFGrYlC3pnsba8Kfv4g) You can also create bundled offerings (like a course and an e‑book) and subscription models to encourage recurring revenue. ![Create Bundles](https://lh7-rt.googleusercontent.com/docsz/AD_4nXfUcSjg-MVaaqd5798G-v3Zzu_kDJRP30iZfA0oT9H11-5oZBlp0QqLHIiHsmjhKQx4KJk4KwTsjp5dNqK0B8TYxFkEs0bEitF7Yg3ehoigbhkKcUJ-_bLlBPHuh8KwRqY2cRb2yQ?key=QmUdFGrYlC3pnsba8Kfv4g) Beyond that, there’s space to generate limited-time offers and smart upsell banners to incentivize immediate purchases. And to top it off, a built-in affiliate engine helps you launch referral campaigns and track conversions via real-time reporting. You know what, let me just list all of its biggest marketing features: - Integrated pop‑ups and survey forms to capture leads, - Bundled pricing and coupon codes to segment offers and encourage conversions, - Native integration with email and CRM tools like GetResponse, AWeber, and Moosend - Zapier, Make, Pabbly, and Integrately for custom workflows - Integrated funnel builder within the site builder - Deep behavioral analytics, including clicks, heatmaps, and  scroll tracking, to optimize funnel design In revenue tracking, LearnWorlds leaves out nothing. You already get extensive reporting on sales, coupon effectiveness, course enrollments, and affiliate performance. ![Reports center](https://lh7-rt.googleusercontent.com/docsz/AD_4nXdLIkNX2dl3EqAM5JgmmDjtrQBAERGQcJ_3sTVPnJOVX06DszwPYnHsVa-CfqPjn23xJfOvZEpWAQ8cptsHXdwKSe9oSQ6vNf4KwvNQCVhS_xHMy5uZrLSqJ2u5h25coiK7groF?key=QmUdFGrYlC3pnsba8Kfv4g) The platform's standout feature is detailed content-level analytics, which gives you insights into learner engagement, completion rates, and behavior metrics. #### How does Kajabi perform? Marketing is Kajabi’s forte, so Kajabi scores very high on this aspect. I am quite confident that Kajabi will be able to handle most of your marketing needs without any external tools, unlike LearnWorlds. ![Kajabi perform](https://lh7-rt.googleusercontent.com/docsz/AD_4nXcIkKLw2rCFNsZpGc8DysThrOOXOG5YtH2TjY9RENfjIXM4IktlwrozlQbsLMNSbpsk8NICwOylWp7CURANzqzt09B86XoXoeC1rz4vEzd6MXIPZIc1FTzSln9ao-wakjRoGQ8SEw?key=QmUdFGrYlC3pnsba8Kfv4g) First, sales and checkout. Here, you’ll be greeted by Kajabi Payments, the built-in processor. It accepts credit cards, subscriptions, and uses payment options like Apple Pay, Google Pay, Afterpay, and Klarna, without transaction charges from Kajabi. ![Create Events](https://lh7-rt.googleusercontent.com/docsz/AD_4nXeQspM2_QVGZLHnkIe2PLg1FchfSg_56p_5M-FGlSI3EZektc3wOdmnavW0lqBv8nHfMARHMU22ux0HewRbKQ_K1J2MPUwvnHoUOrIGZN3IjRjGuquq-brF4fc8gyG-GG7w5aj2aQ?key=QmUdFGrYlC3pnsba8Kfv4g) Depending on your plan level, you can create an infinite number of offers, landing pages, and sales funnels. Then there’s also an integrated affiliate system to recruit and manage promoters. ![Events](https://lh7-rt.googleusercontent.com/docsz/AD_4nXcKTgLw_XstyrT0KSK8ikqticZB5iUdjAy-cSnDG95PpIRvAzNqwUbwRozFxrgZJbVmptChEWEkfUYiqkgcj9S5kAZe-6yLUKnRIVOEqDe2MumyG1Y6dEhDxbkijTbGQNdJDH8tsQ?key=QmUdFGrYlC3pnsba8Kfv4g) Oh, and Kajabi takes no cut of your sales revenue, only standard processing fees. Now, let me again list all the notable marketing features: - Email campaigns with embedded videos, countdown timers, drip sequences, and A/B subject testing - Visual funnel builder to build fully automated workflows (opt-in to sale) - Unlimited landing pages, opt-in forms, and events (live webinars) included - Tagging, custom contact fields, advanced “if-then” automations - Create marketing copy, social posts, and email templates quickly using AI tools - Visual dashboards for daily/weekly revenues, top-performing offers, and average order value - Deliver the entire business via a white-label mobile app It’s worth mentioning that Kajabi also takes a broader, integrated approach to analytics. You get dashboards that clearly display daily, weekly, and monthly revenue, funnel conversion rates, and customer value metrics. ![Kajabi DashBoard](https://lh7-rt.googleusercontent.com/docsz/AD_4nXcLtzL-VglZUHcFPn-4FxPWt3bLrjH220LKfVex-o3gAtaJFAnYcLso0MdgY02gy5dBBbKFSANojAABUmyeG6DEJXVgYX88vQ6eDWtCogj1NfO0CXjv8ErtNQIt03eSVo2HKYm2BQ?key=QmUdFGrYlC3pnsba8Kfv4g) Its analytics connect directly with its email marketing and funnel-building tools, which makes it simpler to identify which stages in the funnel perform best and where optimizations are needed. ![Analytics](https://lh7-rt.googleusercontent.com/docsz/AD_4nXcUk4p2BZQJfeNneN2Ydk6DBYRJBdypP35wzRlUG-x6-imP3Yxo_3osDpvg3oSHZQgMoikPrBDwb7gA85AtQ-9cSQLRRlNYPYjjJg5uYFazF2rrqUuXkkWuI2nFqIRbHOueO8cDyw?key=QmUdFGrYlC3pnsba8Kfv4g) Additionally, Kajabi’s granular contact-level insights let you track individual user journeys in a much better way, like tracking purchases, interactions, and engagement. #### Winner: Kajabi For creators whose primary goal is simplified monetization, built-in funnels, and frictionless checkout with powerful marketing automation, Kajabi takes the crown. Its unified marketing suite, with landing pages, email sequencers, events, affiliate onboarding, and conversion analytics, supports a sales-first approach with minimal setup friction. However, LearnWorlds remains an excellent, flexible alternative when paired with external marketing tools like CRMs and email automations. #### The other, better option Oh boy! Another Freshlearn promo? Wait! Here me out. FreshLearn delivers the same “everything‑lives‑here” ease you get from Kajabi — checkouts, [email automation](https://freshlearn.com/features/automations?utm_source=blog), visual funnels — yet sidesteps the premium price tag and product ceilings with unlimited items and 0% platform fees. ![FreshLearn Demo](https://lh7-rt.googleusercontent.com/docsz/AD_4nXd7g1G98uoAaXxhKePX4zHfPZEUZBMWroLZkZe4pmH45fAwtCybWFYsfWQYRLGHrTDZ3UeCxI9xcx_M9nFSBcbeFZmqMuazL0i_zdATrlR7Welln7TzLlt4K9TMuVsQ742FvuXbNA?key=QmUdFGrYlC3pnsba8Kfv4g) Freshlearn’s product philosophy is simple: strip out the duct‑tape integrations and replace them with native tools that talk to each other from day one. Here’s what you get: - **AI Agents for instant assets**: It’s easy to generate complete course outlines, quizzes, and persuasive sales pages in a couple of clicks, which collapses days of copywriting and design into minutes. - **AI Page Builder**: Drop in a title, choose a goal, and FreshLearn assembles a conversion‑ready landing page, complete with images, sections, and call‑to‑action buttons. - **Lead‑magnet studio**: You can produce interactive quizzes, [e‑books](https://freshlearn.com/blog/how-to-write-an-ebook/?utm_source=blog), or live workshops that feed directly into your lists. - **Responsive email designer:** Create broadcasts in a visual builder that renders flawlessly on every screen and inbox. - **Integrated blog and newsletter hub:** Publish articles, then push them straight to subscribers’ inboxes. - **Drag‑and‑drop email builder and automations**: Design device‑perfect campaigns, then trigger them with a visual workflow canvas that segments subscribers automatically. - **Built‑in affiliate and referral engine**: Launch a program, bulk‑convert any student into an affiliate, and track commissions without any external trackers. - **Zero platform fees**: You get to keep 100% of every sale while still processing one‑offs, subscriptions, or instalments through Stripe or PayPal. The best part is that these pieces aren’t scattered around separate dashboards; they’re seamlessly blended inside FreshLearn’s _Marketing_ hub. A creator can: 1. **Attract** with a quiz or e‑book lead magnet, 2. **Capture** the visitor on an AI‑built page, 3. **Nurture** with pre‑written, behavior‑based email flows, and 4. **Convert** via checkout at zero transaction fees, then hand the purchaser a unique referral link to start the cycle again. Because analytics flow through the same pipeline, every open, click, and sale shows up in one report—no spreadsheet gymnastics. ![Create Checkout pages](https://lh7-rt.googleusercontent.com/docsz/AD_4nXenL1h5bdzVv0FH3fOAY4OWuaexDXXTVcdrwa6QVI5UBnICJFg8dba21wtP-cpQD3OM1Vdo0XF7Wqq4L1EzPVb1lufInL4GWVpawQ8DNWnz0pN_rIDNpvL1j5ANdlQzgfd7dZ6zzw?key=QmUdFGrYlC3pnsba8Kfv4g) Add the branded mobile app option and free SSL‑secured domains, and FreshLearn offers a marketing ecosystem that rivals Kajabi’s breadth while preserving the granular control that LearnWorlds fans love. ## The Deciding Factor: Pricing When creators get to this point, most of them have a calculator in one hand and a coffee‑stained paper in the other. I’ve done the math for you, using only the prices published on each vendor’s site, so you can see the real monthly outlay behind the marketing slogans. ### The real cost of LearnWorlds ![LearnWorlds Pricing](https://lh7-rt.googleusercontent.com/docsz/AD_4nXf1s1FFLcwSvGVJ5KCxflkFSYIU5zIziBRb5Q3RFECIl5PPWmPfLepKA9wmbd9Wzr6Tto0JxJJHpj1o_h2cOIDkNmnSTRkJl-tRg9qSOOCpEyA98r0DoxU00wmJehhnnV68BlCh5Q?key=QmUdFGrYlC3pnsba8Kfv4g) LearnWorlds’ Pro Trainer tier rings in at $99 per month with no transaction fees. That’s great for hosting courses, but the moment you need a serious marketing stack, you have to add on extra tools: | | | | | --- | --- | --- | | Add‑On | Why You Need It | Price | | ConvertKit Creator Pro (1,000 contacts) | Email campaigns and automations | $59/mo | | Leadpages Standard | Landing‑page and funnel builder | $37/mo | True “all‑in‑one” cost: $99 + $59 + $37 = $195 every month. That’s three dashboards, three support teams, and $4,680 over two years, before you’ve even paid for webinars or advanced analytics. ### Kajabi’s “All‑in‑One” price and limitations ![Kajabi Pricing](https://lh7-rt.googleusercontent.com/docsz/AD_4nXcLvHcdcNN1OdFoO_zqtFcc4lAcSla8JeSuDQXsGWklxONDLpfQcbxjFl6UA9X4i0ZWJIxI85kmLPLyDBFYt2ZdDZsQO9HZjjNXa5ipNo2OWQVSTD0RNx5sZOX2ZC-f-Bx7BaB1?key=QmUdFGrYlC3pnsba8Kfv4g) Kajabi bundles email, funnels, and checkout, but it controls growth with hard ceilings: - **Basic - $149/mo:** 3 products, 3 funnels, 10,000 contacts. Most creators outgrow those limits after a single launch cycle. - **Growth - $199/mo:** 15 products, 15 funnels, affiliates, and advanced automations. Realistically, this is the true entry point for anyone planning multiple offers. - **Pro - $399/mo:** 100 products and 100 funnels for enterprise‑level catalogs Even on Growth, you’re committing to $4,776 over the next 24 months, and those product caps still exist. ### The FreshLearn advantage: Transparent, all‑inclusive pricing ![FreshLearn Pricing](https://lh7-rt.googleusercontent.com/docsz/AD_4nXcped5h4pyrdNIlVc6-aP9YoEKYdgCBdTmI9AeOB_yUg0j-cK4HW4eEiDa60o7tmpc5C-EKpbMkozEBjjshpooA3MrKYt2lwAraQG-99L7Gpza2lPkJ-2mf2wVQQFOnQV0xeZBVUg?key=QmUdFGrYlC3pnsba8Kfv4g) FreshLearn was priced after watching creators wrestle with stacked subscriptions. Every paid tier includes built‑in email, funnel pages, AI page builder, referral engine, and 0% platform fees. | | | | | | | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | | Plan | Monthly (pay monthly) | Email Credits | Product/Funnel Limits | Platform Fees | | Pro | $49 | 3,000 | Unlimited | 0 % | | No Brainer | $79 | 5,000 | Unlimited | 0 % | | No Brainer + | $149 | 12,000 | Unlimited | 0 % | Want the lowest effective rate? Pre‑paying two years on Pro drops the cost to $29/mo (billed $699), still with unlimited products and funnels. ### Total cost of ownership over 24 Months | | | | | | --- | --- | --- | --- | | Platform | Stack / Plan | Billing Model | 24‑Month Cost | | LearnWorlds | Pro Trainer + ConvertKit Pro + Leadpages | Three separate monthly subs | $4,680 | | Kajabi | Growth plan | Single monthly sub | $4,776 | | FreshLearn | Pro two‑year plan | One upfront payment | $699 | What does this mean? Three things: - LearnWorlds looks affordable on the surface, but once you add email and funnels, you’re paying nearly the same as Kajabi, without the convenience. - Kajabi removes integrations but charges the highest entry fee and limits products until you upgrade. - FreshLearn delivers the full marketing stack from day one, imposes no limits, and costs roughly one‑seventh as much over a two‑year horizon. If your calculator is still out, the numbers speak for themselves. ## Finally: 3 Quick Questions to Find Your Perfect Platform Scrolling through endless feature grids is no different than comparing jet engines to bicycles. Everything looks shiny until you ask the right questions. Use this three‑step filter to land on the platform that actually fits the way you work. ### Question 1: What are you selling today (and tomorrow)? #### Single signature course? You want a friction‑free checkout and a player that makes your content look premium. LearnWorlds nails the interactive lesson side with perks like clickable video hotspots and in‑player workbooks. FreshLearn layers the same delivery power onto a lighter‑weight, lower‑cost stack. #### A portfolio of courses, downloads, or coaching offers? Kajabi shines here with its drag‑and‑drop product catalog and unified dashboard; you can start a mini‑course, a membership, and a coaching program without leaving the interface. FreshLearn matches that breadth but adds free, one‑time, or recurring price options on every product, so expanding doesn’t force an upgrade. #### A community‑driven membership? Kajabi’s built‑in Communities keep discussions under one roof and marry neatly with its email automations. LearnWorlds can mimic this with integrated social feeds, but community is its side gig, not the headline. FreshLearn meets in the middle: flexible access rules, gamification badges, leaderboards, and progress tracking that turn lurkers into superfans. ### Question 2: What’s the real budget: cash and time? #### Bootstrapping or market‑testing? FreshLearn’s free tier lets you launch a full course without swiping a credit card. You upgrade only when you need advanced automations or your custom domain; it’s handy when validation is priority one. #### Laser‑focused on a single high‑ticket offer? LearnWorlds’ $99/mo Pro Trainer plan, plus its beefy interactive toolset, makes sure every student feels the premium price tag. Just remember you’ll add on email and funnels elsewhere, which adds both dollars and dashboards. #### Ready to scale with capital in hand? Kajabi’s Growth plan ($199/mo) packs email, funnels, and an affiliate center behind one login. It’s perfect if you’re happy to pay top dollar for convenience. For many creators, that’s overkill; FreshLearn’s No Brainer tier ($79/mo) mirrors the same toolkit. ### Question 3: How much flexibility will you need a year from now? #### Brand‑first, highly customized experience? LearnWorlds offers true white‑label control,  starting from custom mobile apps to granular CSS tweaks. It’s ideal for corporate training or agencies serving multiple brands. #### Automation depth without code? Kajabi’s visual pipeline builder handles complex “if‑this‑then‑that” logic natively. FreshLearn mirrors that with a drag‑and‑drop automations canvas, and because it’s baked into every paid tier, you’re not paying extra for the day you need more sophisticated journeys. #### Data freedom and integrations? Both LearnWorlds and FreshLearn expose open APIs and robust Zapier hooks. Kajabi covers common scenarios but keeps advanced data flows closer to its chest. ## Conclusion: The Best Platform Is the One That Accelerates You A tool that looks inexpensive on paper can become the priciest option if you’re stuck piling add‑ons or wrestling with limits every quarter. - Choose LearnWorlds if interactive learning and white-label branding are mission-critical, and you don’t mind adding marketing tools. - Choose Kajabi if you crave an all-in-one cockpit and can afford $200 a month for the privilege. - Pick FreshLearn if you want the same all‑in‑one firepower, without the premium price or product caps. We’ve watched too many creators overspend on features they never touch or abandon platforms that throttle growth. FreshLearn aims to end that cycle: one login, full stack, zero transaction fees. Launch free, upgrade only when revenue justifies it, and migrate pain‑free if you’re coming from elsewhere. Ready to see if it fits? [Start a test course on FreshLearn](https://freshlearn.com/) and answer these three questions for yourself. ## FAQs **1\. Can I migrate my existing courses from Kajabi or LearnWorlds to FreshLearn without losing data?** Absolutely. FreshLearn has a [concierge migration service](https://freshlearn.com/free-migration) for annual subscribers that handles course content, student records, and payment links. You export your videos, PDFs, and user lists; the migration team maps them to FreshLearn’s course builder, recreates drip schedules, and issues new login credentials to learners. **2\. How do transaction fees differ among LearnWorlds, Kajabi, and FreshLearn?** LearnWorlds charges a 5% platform fee only on its Starter tier; Pro Trainer and above have 0% platform fees, but you’ll still pay Stripe or PayPal processing. Kajabi uses Kajabi Payments or Stripe; either way, there is no extra platform surcharge, only standard card‑processing rates (roughly 2.9% + 30¢). FreshLearn also sits at 0% platform fees on every tier, so after inevitable card fees, FreshLearn and Kajabi have similar per‑sale costs, while LearnWorlds’ Starter tier is costlier. **3\. If my catalogue explodes to dozens of courses and offers, which platform forces the fewest upgrades?** FreshLearn removes caps entirely, with unlimited courses, funnels, and students on every paid tier. Kajabi’s Basic tops out at three products and three pipelines; most creators jump to Growth (15 of each) or Pro (100). LearnWorlds allows unlimited “courses” but counts bundles and memberships as courses too, which can tangle reporting. **4\. I rely on interactive elements to keep students engaged—does FreshLearn match LearnWorlds’ depth?** LearnWorlds leads with in‑video quizzes, clickable hotspots, and interactive e‑books; these are fantastic for formal assessment. FreshLearn answers with graded quizzes, assignments, gamified badges, leaderboards, lesson‑triggered emails, and mobile push nudges. While it doesn’t embed questions inside the video frame itself, it adds engagement layers that Kajabi lacks, and all marketing automations live in the same dashboard. **5\. When does FreshLearn become cheaper than Kajabi’s Growth tier in real dollars?** Kajabi Growth is $199 per month, regardless of revenue. FreshLearn Pro, billed biannually, costs $699 for the same period. Subtract the identical processor fees, and FreshLearn saves you a significant amount. That means unless Kajabi’s additional features generate over close to $200 in extra net profit every single month, FreshLearn leaves more money in your pocket from day one.
